summary: Completed testing of historical momentum tracking for collective field (4 weeks). All backend tests pass (19/19). Frontend correctly displays sparkline visualization with week labels, weekly dots, and Hebrew trend insight. Backend /api/orientation/history returns weekly_snapshots array with 4 weeks, sparkline_data array, trend_type, and trend_insight in Hebrew.
critical_code_review_comments: GOOD: Backend correctly calculates 4 weeks of historical data with week boundaries
GOOD: weekly_snapshots array includes all required fields: week_label, week_start, center_x, center_y, dominant_direction, positive_ratio, total_actions
GOOD: sparkline_data correctly mirrors positive_ratio values from weekly_snapshots
GOOD: trend_insight generated in Hebrew based on trend analysis
GOOD: Frontend displays sparkline SVG with polyline and circle data points
GOOD: Week labels in Hebrew (שבוע 1, שבוע 2, שבוע 3, השבוע)
GOOD: Weekly dots show dominant direction colors when data available
GOOD: Trend insight text displayed with Hebrew message
GOOD: data-testid attributes present for field-history-section, sparkline-container, trend-insight
context_for_next_testing_agent: Historical momentum tracking feature fully tested. Current state shows 1 week with data (64 actions) and 3 empty weeks, so trend_insight says 'אין מספיק נתונים היסטוריים לזיהוי מגמה' (Not enough historical data to identify trend). The sparkline shows flat line for empty weeks (50% positive ratio default) and jumps to 81.2% for current week. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_field_history.py.

frontend_tests.sparkline_svg_present: PASS - SVG with polyline and circles
frontend_tests.trend_insight_displayed: PASS - 'אין מספיק נתונים היסטוריים לזיהוי מגמה.'
